rationale: Wu et al. (2011) is cited in the analysis section as precedent for constructing a dominant self-construal index from Singelis items. This supports a specific operationalization choice that the authors then use to test their hypotheses, so the citation has a clear methodological function. Although it is not central to the paper's core theory and appears with another citation, it is more than a passing background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Wu et al.'s prior approach to operationalizing self-construal, using a difference-based composite (interdependent minus independent) in its regression analyses.
